description: Authorize a separate Phase 55 for exactly seed123 and seed202 under the fixed Phase 52 128x128, 40-epoch protocol.
rationale: Directly addresses the unresolved seed-sensitivity question while holding the established training and diagnostic protocol fixed.

description: Authorize seed123 only and require another decision before seed202.
rationale: It reduces immediate compute but delays the predefined three-seed comparison even though the fixed protocol and diagnostics are ready.

description: Change resolution before evaluating seed sensitivity at 128x128.
rationale: A resolution change would confound attribution before the established 128x128 protocol has bounded replication evidence.

option_name: Defer training for reporting or manuscript work
description: Continue reporting, visualization, and manuscript work without new training.
rationale: Useful non-training work, but it leaves the principal seed-robustness gap unresolved.

option_name: Defer all expansion because evidence is insufficient
description: Authorize no training when required evidence is missing, contradictory, or inadequate for controlled replication.
rationale: Required if evidence validation fails; the reviewed Phase 52/53 artifacts otherwise support the bounded Option A design.
